title: Date Jam Ferment
description: A dense and fermented date-night polish dish that features a unique blend of sweet and tangy flavors for an egg-free-friendly treat.
instructions: Soak dates in water for at least 8 hours or overnight to soften and release their natural sugars.
Drain the soaking liquid from the dates, leaving them moist but not dripping wet.
Place soaked dates into a food processor with an additional cup of fresh water. Blend until smooth, scraping down the sides as needed.
Pour blended date mixture back into a saucepan over medium heat and stir in pectin powder.
Simmer mixture for about 10 minutes or until it thickens to jam consistency, stirring occasionally to prevent scorching.
Transfer hot date jam to sterilized jars and seal tightly. Store at room temperature for up to one week.
